metadata.description: Plugins for managing your Resolve Pay account from AI assistants via the Resolve MCP

plugins.name: resolve-mcp
plugins.description: Base plugin: connects the Resolve MCP server and teaches the assistant Resolve's core workflows — customers, invoices, shipments, payments, and credit notes.

plugins.name: resolve-invoice-management
plugins.description: Deep-dive invoice workflows: full lifecycle rules, PDF handling, advances, credit notes, and shipments. Pairs with the resolve-mcp plugin (requires the Resolve MCP connector).

plugins.name: resolve-customer-management
plugins.description: Customer onboarding and credit workflows: create customers, run credit checks, track enrollment, and read credit lines. Pairs with the resolve-mcp plugin (requires the Resolve MCP connector).
